name: Sklearn XGBoost Classifier
description: XGBoost Classifier is an optimized gradient boosting algorithm that uses ensemble of decision trees. It is designed for efficiency, flexibility, and portability. Provides parallel tree boosting and is widely used for supervised learning tasks like classification.

fields.name: targetCol
fields.title: Target Column
fields.description: The label column for model fitting

fields.name: featureCols
fields.title: Feature Columns
fields.description: Feature columns of type - all numeric, boolean and vector

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Split Ratio

fields.name: n_estimators
fields.title: NEstimators
fields.description: Number of boosting rounds (trees) to fit.

fields.name: max_depth
fields.title: MaxDepth
fields.description: Maximum depth of a tree. Increasing depth makes the model more complex and likely to overfit.

fields.name: learning_rate
fields.title: LearningRate
fields.description: Step size shrinkage used to prevent overfitting. Also called eta.

fields.name: subsample
fields.title: Subsample
fields.description: The fraction of samples used for fitting the individual base learners. Lower values help prevent overfitting.

fields.name: colsample_bytree
fields.title: ColsampleByTree
fields.description: Subsample ratio of columns when constructing each tree.

fields.name: gamma
fields.title: Gamma
fields.description: Minimum loss reduction required to make a further partition on a leaf node.

fields.name: min_child_weight
fields.title: MinChildWeight
fields.description: Minimum sum of instance weight (hessian) needed in a child.

fields.name: objective
fields.title: Objective
fields.description: Specifies the learning task and objective function.

fields.name: eval_metric
fields.title: EvalMetric
fields.description: Evaluation metric for validation data.

fields.name: reg_alpha
fields.title: RegAlpha (L1)
fields.description: L1 regularization term on weights.

fields.name: reg_lambda
fields.title: RegLambda (L2)
fields.description: L2 regularization term on weights.

fields.name: random_state
fields.title: RandomState
fields.description: Random seed for reproducibility.

fields.name: n_jobs
fields.title: NJobs
fields.description: Number of parallel threads used to run xgboost.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Whether to display confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Title name to display in Confusion Matrix Chart

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Description to display in Confusion Matrix Chart

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend name to display for Target in Confusion Matrix

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix PredictedLabel Legend
fields.description: Legend name to display for Predicted Label in Confusion Matrix

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend name to display for Count in Confusion Matrix

fields.name: path
fields.title: Save Confusion Matrix Path
fields.description: Save Confusion Matrix

fields.name: confusionMatrixRowDescription
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Outcome description
fields.description: One can provide the business details of the outcome of the confusion matrix rows

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Whether to display ROC Curve chart.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: Title name to display in ROC Curve Chart

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Add Description for ROC Curve Chart

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: X label

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Y label
